question: Does the paper report HIV sequences from patient samples?
explain: The paper mentions that the R263K substitution was found in two of four INSTI-naïve treatment-experienced participants who failed DTG therapy in the SAILING clinical trial. This indicates that HIV sequences from patient samples were analyzed.
